text:
obrien      2009-03-13 15:54:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    shells/bash          Makefile 
  Log:
  Use Bison in the build instead of byacc.
  This fixes the issue of '$()' (for ``) not being parsed correctly.
  
  PR:             101230
  Submitted by:   bf2006a@yahoo.com
